# Essentia Notice

Upstream:
- https://github.com/MTG/essentia

Integrated role:
- native offline tempo, key, and pitch analysis backend when present

License:
- AGPLv3

The AGPLv3 text bundled at repository root in `LICENSE` is the same license
text required for Essentia redistributions. If redistributed binaries include
native Essentia code from `third_party/_native/essentia-prefix`, keep both the
root `LICENSE` file and this notice in the packaged release.

Native Essentia builds used by this project also compile Eigen header code into
the resulting binary. Keep `EIGEN-NOTICE.md` together with the bundled MPL 2.0
text when redistributing binaries that include native Essentia.
